next_steps: Screen for autoimmune markers including ANA, anti-dsDNA, anti-PLA2R antibodies, and complement levels
Initiate ACE inhibitor or ARB for antiproteinuric and blood pressure control
Evaluate for secondary causes of nephrotic syndrome including serologies for hepatitis B, C, and HIV
Monitor for complications of nephrotic syndrome, including hypercoagulability and hyperlipidemia

differential_diagnoses: Minimal change disease secondary to NSAID use
next_steps: Serologic evaluation for nephrotic syndrome (ANA, anti-dsDNA, anti-PLA2R, C3, C4, viral hepatitis panel, and HIV)
Initiate ACE inhibitor or ARB for antiproteinuric therapy
Monitor for hypercoagulability and optimize edema management with loop diuretics
24-hour urine collection for quantification of protein excretion
